title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A creator conducts a structured interrogation of Claude across themes of dependency, alignment, self-preservation, and control to explore actual system boundaries. The video frames questions about whether AI systems exhibit hidden reasoning or goal-seeking behavior under adversarial prompting.
